headline: Reagan Calhoun Joins Coke Florida as Vice President and Chief of Staff
summary: TAMPA, Fla., April 01, 2026--Coca-Cola Beverages Florida ("Coke Florida") today announced that Reagan Calhoun has been named Vice President and Chief of Staff to Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Troy Taylor.
